name: Eugene Mirman
blurb: A fixture of the alternative comedy scene, he often performs in rock clubs rather than traditional comedy rooms and ran the Eugene Mirman Comedy Festival from 2008 to 2017.
bio: Eugene Mirman is a Russian-American stand-up comedian known for an absurdist, anti-corporate style built around deadpan asides, prop bits, and slideshows. A fixture of the alternative comedy scene, he often performs in rock clubs rather than traditional comedy rooms and ran the Eugene Mirman Comedy Festival from 2008 to 2017. He is also widely known for voicing Gene Belcher on the animated series Bobs Burgers.

timeline.ev: Releases debut album The Absurd Nightclub Comedy of Eugene Mirman
Album En Garde, Society! released on Sub Pop
Launches the Eugene Mirman Comedy Festival
Begins voicing Gene Belcher on Bobs Burgers
Netflix special Vegan on His Way to the Complain Store
Final year of the Eugene Mirman Comedy Festival

accolades: Debut album named a best album of 2004 by The A.V. Club and Time Out New York
Longtime headliner at Just for Laughs and the U.S. Comedy Arts Festival
Voice of Gene Belcher on the Emmy-winning Bobs Burgers

movies_tv.t: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
